case_title: TERI MARTINEZ VS. JAMES T WEBB et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TERI AS TO DEFENDANT WEBB, JAMES T

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TERI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT JAMES WEBB WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEBB, JAMES T SMITH, ASIA PLAINTIFF CANNOT SUE DEFENDANTS FOR BACK RENT BECAUSE SHE IS NOT LISTED AS A PARTY TO THE LEASE.
